requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling (ZS/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA; Kigali / Montreal Protocol)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理（ZS/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA；基加利/蒙特利尔议定书）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理（ZS/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA；基加利/蒙特利爾議定書）

summary.en: Zambia does not operate an EU-style standalone F-Gas Regulation. Refrigerant control for household refrigerators rests on two pillars: (1) appliance-level flammable-refrigerant safety, addressed through the Zambian Standard adoption of IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA (maximum R-600a / isobutane charge per compartment configuration, ventilation, and ignition-source requirements), verified within ZABS conformity assessment; and (2) ozone-depleting-substance and HFC phase-down obligations under the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment, to which Zambia is a party — administered nationally through the Zambia Environmental Management Agency (ZEMA) and the relevant ozone/climate focal point, with import licensing of controlled substances. R-600a (isobutane, GWP about 3, ISO 817 class A3) is a hydrocarbon, not an HFC, so it is not subject to HFC phase-down quotas; manufacturers must, however, document the refrigerant designation and charge weight (grams) and verify charge against IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA limits.
summary.zh: 赞比亚不设欧盟式独立氟气体法规。家用电冰箱的制冷剂管控基于两大支柱：（1）器具层面的可燃制冷剂安全，通过赞比亚标准采纳IEC 60335-2-24附件AA（每种隔间配置的R-600a/异丁烷最大充注量、通风及点火源要求）处理，并在ZABS合格评定中核验；（2）赞比亚作为缔约方依《蒙特利尔议定书》及其《基加利修正案》承担的消耗臭氧物质与HFC削减义务——由赞比亚环境管理局（ZEMA）及相关臭氧/气候联络点在国内管理，并对受控物质实施进口许可。R-600a（异丁烷，GWP约3，ISO 817 A3类）为碳氢化合物而非HFC，故不受HFC削减配额约束；但制造商须记录制冷剂名称和充注量（克），并核实充注量是否符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值。
summary.zht: 尚比亞不設歐盟式獨立氟氣體法規。家用電冰箱的製冷劑管控基於兩大支柱：（1）器具層面的可燃製冷劑安全，通過尚比亞標準採納IEC 60335-2-24附件AA（每種隔間配置的R-600a/異丁烷最大充注量、通風及點火源要求）處理，並在ZABS合格評定中核驗；（2）尚比亞作為締約方依《蒙特利爾議定書》及其《基加利修正案》承擔的消耗臭氧物質與HFC削減義務——由尚比亞環境管理局（ZEMA）及相關臭氧/氣候聯絡點在國內管理，並對受控物質實施進口許可。R-600a（異丁烷，GWP約3，ISO 817 A3類）為碳氫化合物而非HFC，故不受HFC削減配額約束；但製造商須記錄製冷劑名稱和充注量（克），並核實充注量是否符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值。

standards_or_laws: ZS IEC 60335-2-24 — Annex AA: Requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants (R-600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition source requirements; Zambian adoption of IEC 60335-2-24)

Montreal Protocol on Substances that Deplete the Ozone Layer + Kigali Amendment (HFC phase-down) — Zambia is a party; administered via ZEMA / national ozone focal point with import licensing of controlled substances
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)

summary.en: China addresses flammable-refrigerant safety for household appliances primarily through GB 4706.13-2014, which incorporates R-600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24, with GB 9237 (refrigerating-system safety, aligned with ISO 5149) at system level. China is a party to the Montreal Protocol and ratified the Kigali Amendment in June 2021, operating its HFC phase-down schedule through the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE). Chinese household refrigerators have largely transitioned to R-600a. Chinese appliance manufacturers exporting R-600a units to Zambia are generally well-positioned on the refrigerant dimension, but charge amounts and documentation must be verified against the Zambian ZS/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA basis.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具的可燃制冷剂安全主要通过GB 4706.13-2014处理，其中纳入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性规定，系统层面有GB 9237（制冷系统安全，参照ISO 5149）。中国为《蒙特利尔议定书》缔约方，并于2021年6月批准《基加利修正案》，由生态环境部（MEE）执行HFC削减计划。中国家用电冰箱已大量转向R-600a。向赞比亚出口R-600a机型的中国器具制造商在制冷剂方面一般具备良好条件，但充注量及文件须按赞比亚ZS/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA基准核实。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具的可燃製冷劑安全主要通過GB 4706.13-2014處理，其中納入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性規定，系統層面有GB 9237（製冷系統安全，參照ISO 5149）。中國為《蒙特利爾議定書》締約方，並於2021年6月批准《基加利修正案》，由生態環境部（MEE）執行HFC削減計畫。中國家用電冰箱已大量轉向R-600a。向尚比亞出口R-600a機型的中國器具製造商在製冷劑方面一般具備良好條件，但充注量及文件須按尚比亞ZS/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA基準核實。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — flammable refrigerant (R-600a) requirements for household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Montreal Protocol + Kigali Amendment — China HFC phase-down schedule (Kigali ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a appliances the gap is documentation and charge verification rather than a fundamental technology gap: (1) product documentation for Zambia must state the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane), charge weight in grams, and the safety precautions per IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA, in English; (2) the R-600a charge must be verified against IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA maximum limits (a function of compartment configuration), and Chinese CCC test reports may not explicitly confirm Zambian-accepted charge-limit compliance if tested under slightly different configurations; (3) if any model in the export range still uses an HFC (e.g., R-134a), the importer should confirm the unit does not require an HFC import licence/quota allocation under Zambia's Kigali/Montreal implementation administered by ZEMA. Zambia has no EU 2024/573-style product-level HFC prohibition schedule for household refrigerators, but controlled-substance import licensing may apply. [Confirm the current ZEMA import-licensing position for any HFC-charged units before shipment.]
gap.zh: 对于R-600a器具，差距在于文件和充注量核实，而非根本性技术差距：（1）面向赞比亚的产品文件须以英文说明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）、充注量（克）及依IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的安全注意事项；（2）R-600a充注量须按IEC 60335-2-24附件AA最大限值（取决于隔间配置）核实，若中国CCC检测报告在略有不同的配置下测试，可能未明确确认符合赞比亚接受的充注量限值；（3）若出口系列中仍有机型使用HFC（如R-134a），进口商应确认该机型是否需依赞比亚由ZEMA执行的基加利/蒙特利尔实施申请HFC进口许可/配额。赞比亚对家用电冰箱无欧盟2024/573式产品级HFC禁令时间表，但受控物质进口许可可能适用。【对任何含HFC机型，发货前请确认ZEMA当前进口许可立场。】
gap.zht: 對於R-600a器具，差距在於文件和充注量核實，而非根本性技術差距：（1）面向尚比亞的產品文件須以英文說明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）、充注量（克）及依IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的安全注意事項；（2）R-600a充注量須按IEC 60335-2-24附件AA最大限值（取決於隔間配置）核實，若中國CCC檢測報告在略有不同的配置下測試，可能未明確確認符合尚比亞接受的充注量限值；（3）若出口系列中仍有機型使用HFC（如R-134a），進口商應確認該機型是否需依尚比亞由ZEMA執行的基加利/蒙特利爾實施申請HFC進口許可/配額。尚比亞對家用電冰箱無歐盟2024/573式產品級HFC禁令時間表，但受控物質進口許可可能適用。【對任何含HFC機型，發貨前請確認ZEMA當前進口許可立場。】

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level via ZS/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA (R-600a charge limits) within ZABS conformity assessment; HFC/ODS import licensing under Montreal Protocol + Kigali Amendment administered by ZEMA; no EU-style product-level F-Gas prohibition schedule
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE — separate from any Zambian regime

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is well-positioned for Zambia: it is a low-GWP hydrocarbon not subject to HFC phase-down quotas, and its safety is governed by ZS/IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA within ZABS conformity assessment. Manufacturers must document refrigerant type and charge weight and verify charge against Annex AA limits. Any HFC-charged models should be checked against ZEMA import-licensing under Zambia's Montreal/Kigali implementation. Confirm current requirements with a qualified consultant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a对赞比亚具备良好条件：作为低GWP碳氢化合物不受HFC削减配额约束，其安全由ZABS合格评定下的ZS/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA管理。制造商须记录制冷剂类型及充注量，并核实充注量是否符合附件AA限值。任何含HFC机型应按赞比亚蒙特利尔/基加利实施由ZEMA管理的进口许可核查。请向合格顾问核实现行要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a對尚比亞具備良好條件：作為低GWP碳氫化合物不受HFC削減配額約束，其安全由ZABS合格評定下的ZS/IEC 60335-2-24附件AA管理。製造商須記錄製冷劑類型及充注量，並核實充注量是否符合附件AA限值。任何含HFC機型應按尚比亞蒙特利爾/基加利實施由ZEMA管理的進口許可核查。請向合格顧問核實現行要求。
